scripts.bench:version: NX_NO_CLOUD=true hyperfine --show-output --setup 'pnpm exec nx reset' --warmup 1 --min-runs 10 --export-json results-version.json 'pnpm exec nx --version'

scripts.bench:cat-warm: NX_NO_CLOUD=true hyperfine --show-output --setup 'pnpm exec nx reset' --warmup 1 --min-runs 5 --export-json results-cat-warm.json 'pnpm exec nx run-many -t cat --tui=false'
scripts.bench:copy-warm: NX_NO_CLOUD=true hyperfine --show-output --setup 'pnpm exec nx reset' --warmup 1 --min-runs 5 --export-json results-copy-warm.json 'pnpm exec nx run-many -t copy --tui=false'
